author: codex-agent

patch.value: Feature A for parser and stdin ingestion behavior.
Flexible parser and stdin ingestion foundation
Implement tolerant key value entry parsing and explicit stdin token support for add style mutation inputs.
Entry parsing accepts csv key value markdown style key value and forgiving comma continuations; stdin token paths are deterministic and safe.
Parser extension scope and command call sites are identified.
Fewer failed add mutations due to formatting
Improves automation success with minimal user friction
Core parser and stdin ingest utilities support resilient entry input
Current strict parsing causes avoidable failures for agent generated payloads
Users and agents can submit richer formatted entry payloads with fewer retries

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Feature A covers shared parser and stdin foundations first.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Maintain backward compatible key value contracts while adding tolerant parsing.

message: Create feature for parser and stdin foundation | explicit_unset=learnings,files,tests,docs,reminders,events,type_options,assignee,reviewer,sprint,release,blocked_by,blocked_reason,unblock_note,reporter,severity,environment,repro_steps,resolution,expected_result,actual_result,affected_version,fixed_version

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Feature complete: pm-luay and pm-0pvk are closed with parser foundation + command-surface ingestion wiring delivered and linked regression suites passing.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Parser foundation and command wiring delivered for resilient add/entry ingestion.
